text: Standing before glass doors and fire safety signs, I feel the sharp clarity of modern infrastructure—sterile, organized, almost silent. In the next moment, vibrant colors and bold text envelop me, invoking curiosity. This R+D space breathes with possibility, its energy calling forth questions about collective progress and the nature of innovation. I am both observer and participant, suspended between the promise of discovery and the quiet discipline of ordered spaces. I feel quietly inspired and contemplative here.
